{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Videographer",
  "description": "Itel Energy is a renewable energy solutions company focused on providing reliable, affordable, and sustainable solar power solutions across Nigeria. As part of the itel ecosystem, Itel Energy leverages strong distribution networks and deep market reach to deliver innovative off-grid and hybrid solar solutions for homes, SMEs, and commercial customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Videographer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type:

Job Summary


	itel Energy is seeking a creative and detail-oriented Videographer to produce high-quality visual content that showcases its innovative solar and energy solutions.
	The ideal candidate will play a key role in capturing, editing, and delivering engaging video content for marketing, brand storytelling, and customer education.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan, shoot, and edit high-quality video content for digital platforms (social media, website, campaigns)
	Create engaging product videos, promotional content, testimonials, and event coverage
	Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to develop creative concepts and storyboards
	Handle video equipment setup, lighting, and sound to ensure professional output
	Edit and optimize video content for different platforms and formats
	Maintain and organize video assets and media library
	Stay updated on industry trends and incorporate innovative video techniques


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or relevant certification in Film, Media, or related field (preferred)
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in videography and video editing
	Proficiency in video editing tools (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, After Effects)
	Strong understanding of lighting, composition, and storytelling
	Experience creating content for social media and digital marketing
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
	Creative mindset with attention to detail.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to:&nbsp;adebayo.deborah@transsion.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Videographer Job at Itel Energy




        
    

        
        Itel Energy is a renewable energy solutions company focused on providing reliable, affordable, and sustainable solar power solutions across Nigeria. As part of the itel ecosystem, Itel Energy leverages strong distribution networks and deep market reach to deliver innovative off-grid and hybrid solar solutions for homes, SMEs, and commercial customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Videographer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type:

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	itel Energy is seeking a creative and detail-oriented Videographer to produce high-quality visual content that showcases its innovative solar and energy solutions.
	The ideal candidate will play a key role in capturing, editing, and delivering engaging video content for marketing, brand storytelling, and customer education.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan, shoot, and edit high-quality video content for digital platforms (social media, website, campaigns)
	Create engaging product videos, promotional content, testimonials, and event coverage
	Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to develop creative concepts and storyboards
	Handle video equipment setup, lighting, and sound to ensure professional output
	Edit and optimize video content for different platforms and formats
	Maintain and organize video assets and media library
	Stay updated on industry trends and incorporate innovative video techniques


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or relevant certification in Film, Media, or related field (preferred)
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in videography and video editing
	Proficiency in video editing tools (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, After Effects)
	Strong understanding of lighting, composition, and storytelling
	Experience creating content for social media and digital marketing
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
	Creative mindset with attention to detail.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Media Content Strategist",
  "description": "Itel Energy is a renewable energy solutions company focused on providing reliable, affordable, and sustainable solar power solutions across Nigeria. As part of the itel ecosystem, Itel Energy leverages strong distribution networks and deep market reach to deliver innovative off-grid and hybrid solar solutions for homes, SMEs, and commercial customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Media Content Strategist

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	The Media Content Strategist is responsible for planning, developing, and managing content across various media platforms to engage target audiences, drive brand awareness, and support business objectives.
	This role combines creativity, data analysis, and strategic thinking to ensure content is impactful, consistent, and aligned with overall marketing goals.


Key Responsibilities


	??Develop and execute a comprehensive content strategy across digital and traditional media channels (social media, websites, blogs, email, video, etc
	??Plan and manage content calendars to ensure timely and consistent delivery
	??Collaborate with creative teams (designers, writers, videographers) to produce high-quality content
	??Optimize content for SEO and platform-specific performance
	??Monitor and analyze content performance using analytics tools and adjust strategies accordingly
	??Manage content distribution and promotion strategies to maximize reach and engagement.


Qualifications


	??Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Media, or a related field
	??Proven experience in content strategy, digital marketing, or media planning
	??Strong understanding of social media platforms and content trends
	??Excellent writing, editing, and storytelling skills
	??Proficiency in analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics, social media insights)
	??Basic knowledge of SEO and content optimization techniques
	??Strong project management and organizational skills
	??Ability to work collaboratively and meet deadlines.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to:&nbsp;tomilolamercy76@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Media Content Strategist Job at Itel Energy




        
    

        
        Itel Energy is a renewable energy solutions company focused on providing reliable, affordable, and sustainable solar power solutions across Nigeria. As part of the itel ecosystem, Itel Energy leverages strong distribution networks and deep market reach to deliver innovative off-grid and hybrid solar solutions for homes, SMEs, and commercial customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Media Content Strategist

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Media Content Strategist is responsible for planning, developing, and managing content across various media platforms to engage target audiences, drive brand awareness, and support business objectives.
	This role combines creativity, data analysis, and strategic thinking to ensure content is impactful, consistent, and aligned with overall marketing goals.


Key Responsibilities


	??Develop and execute a comprehensive content strategy across digital and traditional media channels (social media, websites, blogs, email, video, etc
	??Plan and manage content calendars to ensure timely and consistent delivery
	??Collaborate with creative teams (designers, writers, videographers) to produce high-quality content
	??Optimize content for SEO and platform-specific performance
	??Monitor and analyze content performance using analytics tools and adjust strategies accordingly
	??Manage content distribution and promotion strategies to maximize reach and engagement.


Qualifications


	??Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Communications, Media, or a related field
	??Proven experience in content strategy, digital marketing, or media planning
	??Strong understanding of social media platforms and content trends
	??Excellent writing, editing, and storytelling skills
	??Proficiency in analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics, social media insights)
	??Basic knowledge of SEO and content optimization techniques
	??Strong project management and organizational skills
	??Ability to work collaboratively and meet deadlines.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Job Position: Data Analyst

Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Data Analyst to support data-driven decision-making across its operations in Lagos.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for collecting, processing, and analyzing data to generate actionable insights that improve operational efficiency, support strategic planning, and enhance overall business performance within the renewable energy sector.


Key Responsibilities


	??Collect, clean, and analyze large datasets from multiple sources
	??Develop and maintain dashboards, reports, and data visualizations for internal stakeholders
	??Interpret data and provide actionable insights to support business decisions
	??Monitor and report on key performance indicators (KPIs)
	??Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand data needs and business objectives
	??Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and consistency across systems
	??Automate data collection and reporting processes where possible
	??Support forecasting, budgeting, and performance analysis initiatives.


Qualifications


	??Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Computer Science, or a related field
	?? 2- 4 years of experience in a data analysis or similar role
	??Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau)
	??Experience with SQL for data extraction and manipulation
	??Basic knowledge of programming languages such as
	Python or R is an added advantage
	??Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
	??Excellent attention to detail and accuracy.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Channel Specialist",
  "description": "Itel Energy is a renewable energy solutions company focused on providing reliable, affordable, and sustainable solar power solutions across Nigeria. As part of the itel ecosystem, Itel Energy leverages strong distribution networks and deep market reach to deliver innovative off-grid and hybrid solar solutions for homes, SMEs, and commercial customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Channel Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Channel Specialist to manage, develop, and expand its distribution and partner network across multiple states in Nigeria.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for strengthening channel relationships, driving sales performance, and ensuring effective market coverage within assigned regions.


Key Responsibilities


	??Develop and manage relationships with distributors, dealers, and retail partners across assigned states
	Identify and onboard new channel partners to expand market reach
	??Conduct regular market visits to assess partner performance and gather market intelligence
	??Provide training and support to channel partners on products, pricing, and promotions
	??Ensure proper product availability, visibility, and branding in partner outlets
	??Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to execute channel campaigns and promotions
	??Track and report sales performance, market trends, and competitor activities
	??Resolve channel-related issues and ensure high levels of Partner satisfaction.


Qualifications


	??Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Sales, or a related field
	??2 - 5 years of experience in channel sales, distribution, or business development
	??Strong understanding of distribution networks and market dynamics in Nigeria
	??Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets
	??Excellent relationship management and negotiation skills
	??Willingness to travel frequently across assigned states.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to:&nbsp;tomilolamercy76@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Microbiologist",
  "description": "Erisco Foods Limited is an indigenous food product manufacturer, incorporated in Nigeria in 2004 and started operations in 2009, manufacturing Tomato Paste, Seasoning, Rice, Milk cubes and more. We are firmly committed to producing high-quality products that combine nourishment with value pricing, as they strive to become one of Nigeria&rsquo;s largest indigenous foodmanufacturers on a global scale.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Microbiologist
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Erisco foods limited isseeking a proactive and detail oriented Microbiologist to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible be for ensuring product safety, quality and compliance with regulatory standard.


Key Responsibilities


	To conduct routine microbiological and chemical testing of products and ensure compliance with food safety and hygiene standards.
	Monitor quality across raw materials, in-process and finished goods.
	Maintain accurate and complete test records and documentation.
	Perform regular equipment calibration and maintenance checks.
	Assist in internal audits and regulatory inspections.
	Support corrective and preventive action (CAPA) processes.
	Work closely with production for quality improvement initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor of Science (B.Sc) in Microbiology, Food microbiology, Food Science and Technology.
	Minimum of 2 years of hands-on experience in a relevant QC role.
	Good knowledge of Food Safety Standards.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@eriscofoodsltd.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Microbiologist Job at Erisco Foods Limited




        
    

        
        Erisco Foods Limited is an indigenous food product manufacturer, incorporated in Nigeria in 2004 and started operations in 2009, manufacturing Tomato Paste, Seasoning, Rice, Milk cubes and more. We are firmly committed to producing high-quality products that combine nourishment with value pricing, as they strive to become one of Nigeria’s largest indigenous foodmanufacturers on a global scale.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Microbiologist
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Erisco foods limited isseeking a proactive and detail oriented Microbiologist to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible be for ensuring product safety, quality and compliance with regulatory standard.


Key Responsibilities


	To conduct routine microbiological and chemical testing of products and ensure compliance with food safety and hygiene standards.
	Monitor quality across raw materials, in-process and finished goods.
	Maintain accurate and complete test records and documentation.
	Perform regular equipment calibration and maintenance checks.
	Assist in internal audits and regulatory inspections.
	Support corrective and preventive action (CAPA) processes.
	Work closely with production for quality improvement initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor of Science (B.Sc) in Microbiology, Food microbiology, Food Science and Technology.
	Minimum of 2 years of hands-on experience in a relevant QC role.
	Good knowledge of Food Safety Standards.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
